feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to implement custom number range for Invoices for rent?
entry.content:
We have a requirement where we need to implement a custom number range for the Invoices for rent. The standard number range object RERAINV is set to reset the number range every new fiscal year which does not comply with our statutory requirements. This standard number range object is not released so we can't update this nor we can do anything on the config. 

Do we have any extensibility options for this? I found BAdi BADI_RERA_INVOICE where it might be possible via method GET_NUMBER. Unfortunately, this BAdi is not released as well so it is not available in the Custom Logic app.

System: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402

entry.title: Ledger Setup in S/4HANA Public Cloud for country India
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are implementing S/4HANA Public cloud for an Indian company. We want to have a setup of ledgers as below:

0L- Leading – (IAS Corporate as per company's act)

2L  - Non Leading 1 (Ind AS) 

3L   - Non Leading 2 (Tax Reporting)

And Extension ledger – For Adjustments. 

However, Ledgers 2L and 3L belong to Accounting Principles IFRS and US GAAP but we want to use accounting principles as Ind AS and Tax Reporting.  During the starter system setup, we were not allowed to make changes to accounting principles for these ledgers and also were not able to assign Group Currency as INR and fiscal year as V3.

Now we are setting up development system and need to know whether there will be any flexibility available to make the settings as we want. Please let me know if this can be done.

entry.title: Option to send the Purchase requisition back to the requestor
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

in SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, how to configure flexible workflow to have an option to send PR back to to requestor?

Could you please suggest correct way ho to implement it, what to use ?

Thank you very much

entry.title: How can we get a TADIR entry for any given object in S/4Hana Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All

Our requirement would be, we will get one object name and we are not sure about type of the object. In order to find out that information, we were looking if we can get TADIR like entry in public cloud would be helpful. Object also can be standard or custom. I think for custom objects there is a CDS View available. But we need for all objects. Appreciate if any one can help us.

Thanks,

Sreedhar R

entry.title: Scc1 in public
entry.content:
Hello community!

 

In the public version, how do I transmit CR changes within the same server to the client? I want to transfer customization settings to the development client.

 

In the PCE version, it was transmitted as SCC1 t-code.

Thanks in advance.

 

huny

entry.title: I_PurchaseRequisitionTP Multiple Items in One Purchase Requistion
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using are Public Edition Business Object Interfaces I_PurchaseRequisitionTP to create Purchase Requisition with more than one item.

If requisition don't have any warning, it creates one purchase requisition correctly.

If there are warnings, the following pop-up appears and requisition is not created, but number range is consumed.

entry.title: Accessing standard tables from CDS views
entry.content:
Hi.

I am very new to public cloud and CDS views. We would like to read some table data from Public Cloud and it does seem that the old familiar table names are not in the list of tables to read from.

Take for example USR02 and UST12. Does these tables still exist in Public Cloud? If so, how can we create a CDS view to read from here as it seems like they are not in the list of predefined tables.

entry.title: New Document type creation : any codification recommandation/Best practices?
entry.content:
Hi!

I would like to know if there is any best practices/SAP recommandation to codify new accounting document types?

Should we codify them starting by Z*?

As we are planning to roll out new countries and I know that for some localizations (Spain, Italy, etc.), SAP provides new document types to be compliant with the local legal requirements...

Could you please confirm?

Thank you in advance,

Regards

Laure

entry.title: Electronic Bank Statement config for 17BAI external code 856
entry.content:
We are using EBS upload for bank statements in the United States under standard BAI2, identified as 17BAI in SAP on product S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

Our bank is communicating a pair of transaction codes for sweeps between bank accounts, 856 (sweep in, a positive transaction) and 868 (sweep out, a negative transaction). 856 and 868 are not standard BAI2 codes, and the standard has no 8xx range.

For transaction 856, we add a code to the table in "assign external transaction types to posting rules" under "make global settings for electronic bank statements". If the code is added with a + sign, the system will not recognize the code.  It must be added with a - sign. On advise from Support, this is because SAP is configured on the backend to recognize any code greater than 400 as an outflow (besides the 700 range), regardless of the +/- symbol in the table. This makes the +/- symbol merely informational in that table, not determinative, which is surprising. Shouldn't the table then just fill it in for you, instead of allowing you to change it?

So to the 856 and "-" table line, we add posting rule F006, which is debit bank main, credit bank technical as leg one.  The second leg is intended to be credit technical, debit [whatever account is chosen in reprocessing]. 

However, what happens, is that because the system understands the transaction originally as outgoing, we end up with:

Leg 1 (correct):

Dr. Main Cash

Cr. Technical Cash

In the reprocessing screen however the header field for payment shows a negative number, and if you click on 'post to G/L' then the system shows:

Cr. Main Cash (this is locked/grayed out, and obviously a mismatch to leg 1 creating a cash imbalance)

Dr. [user to insert G/L account to post to]

Does anyone have experience with solving for transaction 856? I understand it is not just our bank that provides this code. Or another external transaction type in the 800 range that is an incoming transaction?

We are being told by SAP support that this is just how it works, and we need to have our bank provide only standard codes (which does not make sense to us, since SAP provides a configuration experience to cater for additional codes if you need to).

entry.title: Connect S/4HANA Public Cloud with Integration Suite
entry.content: I have S/4HANA Public Cloud and I want to connect it with the Integration Suite. How can I establish the connection without using SAP cloud connector and Standard Cloud Integration Adapters?

entry.title: Starter Customizing Tentant and Starter Development tenant not sync?
entry.content:
We have 2 starter systems, Starter Customizing Tenant and Starter Development Tenant. All the data and configuration is in the Starter customizing tenant and never uses the Starter Development tenant at all.

We have a need to implement BAdI for the supplier invoice workflow and BAdI implementation is only can implement in the Starter Development Tenant, whereas in the Starter Development Tenant there is no data and configuration like in the Starter Customizing Tenant. then how to overcome this? Meanwhile, the starter customizing tenant and the starter development tenant cannot be in sync.

Sorry because this is our first time implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. If there are any errors in the views and stages I explained above, please correct them further.

Thank You!

entry.title: Waht is subseq. Debit/credti checkbox in "Create Supplier invoice"?
entry.content:
What kind of behavior does checking the "Debit/credti" checkbox cause when creating a credit/debit memo?

Also, what are the criteria for deciding whether to check or not?

entry.title: While doing results recording in QE51n, I could not locate the option to copy inspection results.
entry.content:
I have followed the steps below to copy results from one inspection lot to another.

Copy Inspection Lot Results from One Lot to Other ... - SAP Community

Can you please provide some suggestions? Please find the attachments also.

entry.title: SAP DART for Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Is it possible to use SAP DART in S4H Public cloud ? 

Thanks,

Jinal

entry.title: Link Asset to Project/WBS Element or Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer currently has orders of order type "Standing order" (PM) in the legacy system (SAP ERP 6), on which all costs associated with a certain fixed asset are collected and settled.

This is to be mapped in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. A maintenance order is not necessarily required, as no logistical processes need to be recorded, but only normal costs (invoice, time confirmations, activity allocation, etc.). Projects/WBS elements would even be preferred.

However, it is important to the customer that a fixed asset can be assigned in some way so that the customer knows to which asset the costs are posted. The fixed asset is not the recipient of settlements, but only has an informational character.

In the legacy system, this asset can be assigned via the "Location" tab in the order. From the asset master record, you can access the standing order via Environment->Equipment. In the equipment master, the standing order is then assigned in the "Organization" tab. This gives the customer a connection in both directions.

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, as far as I know, it is no longer possible to create a connection between a fixed asset and an equipment. I also see no other way to assign an order or a WBS element in the asset master record, except for a WBS element as an account assignment element.

Furthermore, I cannot find the possibility to assign an asset directly, neither in a maintenance order nor in a project/WBS element.

Does anyone have experience in a similar topic? Is there possibly a scope item with a functionality that could fulfil these requirements?

Thank you in advance for any tips!

Best regards
Rado

entry.title: Public Cloud - Product Pictures on Sales Quotation Output Form
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we have the requirement that in the Sales Quotation Output Form not only the standard fields should be displayed but a product picture as well.

Our current struggle: There is no binding in the standard data binding to include product images. When looking at the data source extension there is also no way to include this.

Has anyone experience with this requirement and can exist or has an idea and can share this with me?

Thank you so much in advance.

entry.title: Creating Test Users for Fit to Standard WS (email field mandatory)
entry.content:
Hello expert guys, 

We are carrying out preparation activities in out TDD environment (S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition), and following the steps suggested by the methodology, we are creating the Test Users as preparation for Fit to Standard workshops. 

In our System (Starter in customer landscape, and equivalent is Customizing tenant in Partner TDD because here is only one system landscape) the system is requiring a Worker employee created to create the business user, but for the worker master data the email assignment is mandatory, and cannot be repeated. So, as the implementation methodology suggest to create one test user for one role, saying:

"In starter system, create 1 test user per role in a test script. e.g. for Customer Project Management (J11) first name / last name = Project Manager / Commercial Services This makes the demo very applicable to customer experts, who see exactly the apps and processes they would see for their individual roles involved in the overall test script E2E process".

The question is: It is applicable to the TDD Customizing tenant ? Because in our tenant (TDD) the system is requiring a Worker created before to create the business user, but for the worker employee master data the email assignment is mandatory, and cannot be repeated. So, if for example, we need to create 10 test users, we need to have 10 different email accounts? Thats not possible in all cases so we need to know if there is the possibilty to create the test users without the email address. Of course this would only apply for test users since consultants do have email accounts.

Thank you very much in advance for your response and guidance,

Best Regards,

entry.title: Special stock partner assignment at Ship to party level (Customer Consignments)
entry.content: There's a requirement to assign the special stock partner (SB) at the ship to party level when doing customer consignments. The client requires to see customer consignment stock at the outlets for their chain customers. In the standard partner determination setup, special stock partner function is only allowed at the CUST account type, but not for SHPT (ship to accounts). Is there any way we can get the special stock partner assignment at the ship to level.

entry.title: F-51 in public
entry.content:
Hello community!

In fioriappslibrary, F-51 is searched as Post Journal Entries - With Clearing. Please tell me how I can run the app. Even if I search for it in Fiori launchpad, it doesn't come up. (version 2402)

Huny

entry.title: How to do the Synchronous B2BCustomer replication from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana
entry.content:
We have came across a requirement to Integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data from SAP Commerce to S/4 Hana public cloud using sync call.

As we have Asynchronous call in OOTB where we can send the data to CPI and we will not read the response data from CPI, how we can integrate the Outbound B2BCustomer data Synchronously .

Thank you
